title: (Bullish Signal) HOME, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on January 28, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tckeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that HOME's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tckeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 222 similar cases, 196 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 88%. Current price $23.96 is above $16.53 the highest resistance line found by Tckeron A.I. Throughout the month of 12/24/20 - 01/28/21, the price experienced a +53% Uptrend, while the week of 01/21/21 - 01/28/21 shows a -0.93% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/sladq4fpkbe61.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=dccc83d29436e18690602f991539f0a195cd66c8

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on January 05, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on HOME as a result. Tckeron A.I. detected that in 65 of 74 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for HOME just turned positive on January 05, 2021. Looking at past instances where HOME's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tckeron A.I. detected that in 24 of 29 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

HOME moved above its 50-day Moving Average on January 06, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for HOME crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on January 08, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tckeron A.I. detected that in 11 of 13 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

Following a +3.89% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where HOME advanced for three days, in 234 of 295 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8997731-at-home-group-s-home-24-52-aroon-indicator-entered-an-uptrend-on-january-28-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
